Resilience Self-Help Guides
All guides

Personal and Professional Resilience Series — interactive guide for Apex Health Group staff

Apex Health Group
Personal & Professional Resilience
A seven-guide self-help series — for the people who care for others
Private Evidence-based Designed for healthcare
Wellbeing self-assessment
Rate each area honestly from 1 (very low) to 5 (strong). Your lowest-scoring area is your invitation to begin. You can return to this every few weeks to track how you are doing.
—
Overall average score
Suggested starting point
Which guide is right for you right now?
Select what resonates most with how you are feeling today.
The seven guides at a glance
Tap any guide to see what it covers, when to use it, and what to expect.
How to use this series
There is no prescribed order, no completion deadline, and no expectation that you will use all seven guides. This series is a resource — not a curriculum.
"Resilience is not about bouncing back to who you were. It is about growing into who you need to become."
Confidentiality & privacy
Private. This tool runs entirely in your browser — nothing you type is sent to Apex Health or stored on a server.
